summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: Hero 现已支持自定义头像上传、存储与缩略图展示，相关管理界面和多语言文案也一并完善。
summary.en: Change Summary: Heroes now support custom avatar upload, storage, and thumbnail rendering, with matching updates across management surfaces and translations.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

Hero 现已支持自定义头像上传、存储与缩略图展示

  • 变更说明: Hero 现已支持自定义头像上传、存储与缩略图展示，相关管理界面和多语言文案也一并完善。
  • 影响范围: 影响 角色与职业元数据、i18n 相关功能、types 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

Git 与 Vault 场景新增 AI 自动组装 commit 抽屉

  • 变更说明: Git 与 Vault 场景新增 AI 自动组装 commit 抽屉，并支持可配置的 Co-Authored-By 模式、仓库搜索和 Git Profile 选择，提交流程更顺手。
  • 影响范围: 影响 domain 相关功能、vault 相关功能、templates 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话支持自动任务执行

  • 变更说明: 会话支持自动任务执行，并改进实时更新、时间戳判定和列表同步，减少状态延迟带来的割裂感。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、realtime 相关功能、vault 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

豆包语音接入补充了连接监控、热词上下文与后端托管鉴权

  • 变更说明: 豆包语音接入补充了连接监控、热词上下文与后端托管鉴权，语音识别链路更完整。
  • 影响范围: 影响 语音输入与录音、doubao 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有的语音录音入口，无需额外设置即可获得更新后的行为。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

HagiPower 趋势卡片

  • 变更说明: 改进 HagiPower 趋势卡片，以及 Provider Error Retry 配置与错误面板，减少报表和设置页中的使用摩擦。
  • 影响范围: 影响 settings 相关功能、reports 相关功能、claude 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

ProjectGit watcher、前端配置初始化与归档同步相关链路

  • 变更说明: 优化 ProjectGit watcher、前端配置初始化与归档同步相关链路，提升 Git 和会话相关功能的稳定性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 services 相关功能、Git 与仓库工具、frontend 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Heroes now support custom avatar upload

  • Change Summary: Heroes now support custom avatar upload, storage, and thumbnail rendering, with matching updates across management surfaces and translations.
  • Impact: Affects hero and role metadata, I18n, Types.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

AI-assisted commit composition for Git

  • Change Summary: Added AI-assisted commit composition for Git and Vault flows, along with configurable Co-Authored-By modes, repository search, and Git profile selection.
  • Impact: Affects Domain, Vault, Templates.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Sessions now support auto-task execution

  • Change Summary: Sessions now support auto-task execution, with better realtime updates, timestamp freshness, and list synchronization.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, Realtime, Vault.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Doubao voice integration adds connection monitoring

  • Change Summary: Doubao voice integration adds connection monitoring, hotword context, and backend-managed authentication for a more complete speech workflow.
  • Impact: Affects voice input and recording, Doubao.
  • How to Use: Use the existing voice recording entry points; the updated behavior is available without extra setup.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

The HagiPower directional chart card

  • Change Summary: Improved the HagiPower directional chart card and the provider error retry panel to reduce friction in reports and settings.
  • Impact: Affects Reports, Settings, Claude.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: This item also includes supporting stability or cleanup work so the visible behavior stays reliable under the updated flow.

ProjectGit watcher plumbing

  • Change Summary: Improved ProjectGit watcher plumbing, frontend config bootstrap, and archive sync behavior to make Git- and session-related flows more stable.
  • Impact: Affects Services, Git and repository tools, Frontend.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
